channel.title: Peiyu Zhang
channel.description: The personal website of Peiyu Zhang, a Systems and Information Engineering PhD student/researcher at the University of Virginia (UVA) specializing in Human-Computer Interaction/Human Factors. View projects, resume, and contact info.
